arts.ttl: Milan Closing in on Santiago Gimenez Signing
arts.sum: AC Milan are on the verge of securing a major transfer coup as they edge closer to signing Feyenoord's prolific striker Santiago Gimenez. The Rossoneri have made significant progress in negotiations over the past few hours, with growing optimism that the deal could be finalized imminently. arts.ttl: Tottenham on the Verge of Signing Milan’s Tomori: Figures and Details
arts.sum: In a surprising turn of events, AC Milan’s defensive stalwart Fikayo Tomori is reportedly close to joining Tottenham Hotspur. The Premier League club has made a substantial offer of €30 million, including bonuses, for the English centre-back, and the deal appears to be in its final stages. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that Milan have shown openness to the transfer under these terms, indicating that negotiations are at an advanced stage.
